theme: castaway island survival camp rescue beacon

entities.facing_rule: GameRenderer swaps between stand and hold poses and aligns the leader body to travel direction through runtime movement bias.
entities.animation_rule: GameRenderer alternates stand and hold frames by movement rhythm and overlays floating text feedback for gather, rescue, and craft actions.
entities.movement_rule: Left control ring drives eight-direction movement while nearby Action input triggers gather, rescue, repel, or build interactions.

entities.facing_rule: Worker positions and body motion follow assigned role targets around the camp, fishing coast, and build pads.
entities.animation_rule: Role markers tint the worker belt area while the renderer swaps stand and hold frames for work cycles and movement.
entities.movement_rule: Survivors lerp to role-specific task anchors, patrol arcs, or camp support stations based on current job assignment.

entities.facing_rule: Wildlife drifts by velocity and threat approach toward the player or camp perimeter.
entities.animation_rule: Renderer reuses pack sprites with runtime drift, pulse, and threat timing while boar, monkey, snake, and crab move on distinct path loops.
entities.movement_rule: Wildlife bounces within region bounds and causes morale pressure until the player uses Action nearby to repel it.

entities.facing_rule: Buildings stay fixed on camp pads and layer vertically by slot position.
entities.animation_rule: Fire and beacon use pirate pack overlays while shelter, fence, collector, infirmary, and workshop use runtime shapes tied to structure type and completion.
entities.movement_rule: Static camp structures occupy fixed build pads and modify nightly colony resolution.

entities.facing_rule: Nodes are static pickups or rescue points anchored to their world region.
entities.animation_rule: Resource visuals rely on distinct runtime shapes and pulses so driftwood, food, water, herbs, scrap, and castaway rescue markers remain readable at a glance.
entities.movement_rule: Nodes remain fixed until collected, then disappear and respawn on the next island day.

entities.facing_rule: Terrain tiles and wreck props stay static and scroll under the camera.
entities.animation_rule: Background rendering alternates beach, grass, and water tiles by region and layers a static pirate wreck landmark in the ridge zone.
entities.movement_rule: Camera follows the player while the island map remains persistent and bounded.

required_runtime_checks: primary moving entities have idle and move states
attacking or threat entities have interaction or repel states
damageable colony state uses morale and collapse feedback
directional entities define default_facing and facing_rule
runtime loads assigned bitmaps through AssetManager and BitmapFactory
anchors and hitboxes match gameplay contact points
resource and threat visuals remain distinct from decorative terrain
